page_metadata.biotools__summary: New SNP-based pathway analysis software for GWAS studies. SSEA consists of two main steps: selecting representative SNPs for each gene, and performing pathway enrichment analysis using all selected SNPs.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: New SNP-based pathway analysis software for GWAS studies. SSEA consists of two main steps: selecting representative SNPs for each gene, and performing pathway enrichment analysis using all selected SNPs.
